entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_ROLL_ANG_ACCEL
entry.description: Signal amplitude in rad/s^2

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_PITCH_ANG_ACCEL
entry.description: Signal amplitude in rad/s^2

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_YAW_ANG_ACCEL
entry.description: Signal amplitude in rad/s^2

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_X_LINEAR_ACCEL
entry.description: Signal amplitude in m/s^2

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_Y_LINEAR_ACCEL
entry.description: Signal amplitude in m/s^2

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_Z_LINEAR_ACCEL
entry.description: Signal amplitude in m/s^2

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_RUDDER
entry.description: Signal amplitude in rad

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_STERN_PLANE
entry.description: Signal amplitude in rad

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_AILERON
entry.description: Signal amplitude in rad

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_BOW_PLANE
entry.description: Signal amplitude in rad

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_STBD_UPPER_AFT
entry.description: Signal amplitude in rad

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_STBD_LOWER_AFT
entry.description: Signal amplitude in rad

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_PORT_LOWER_AFT
entry.description: Signal amplitude in rad

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_PORT_UPPER_AFT
entry.description: Signal amplitude in rad

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_PORT_BOW_PLANE
entry.description: Signal amplitude in rad

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_STBD_BOW_PLANE
entry.description: Signal amplitude in rad

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_PRIMARY_THRUSTER_SPEED
entry.description: Signal amplitude in RPM

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_HEAVE_VEL
entry.description: Signal amplitude in m/s

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_VBS_FILL_FRAC_FORE
entry.description: Signal amplitude [0,1]

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_VBS_FILL_FRAC_AFT
entry.description: Signal amplitude [0,1]

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_LOCATION_VBS_FILL_FRAC
entry.description: Signal amplitude [0,1]

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_VALID_FLAGS_LOCATION_VALID
entry.description: signal_location cannot be SIGNAL_LOCATION_INVALID (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_VALID_FLAGS_TYPE_VALID
entry.description: signal_type cannot be SIGNAL_TYPE_INVALID (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_VALID_FLAGS_DIRECTION_VALID
entry.description: signal_direction cannot be SIGNAL_DIRECTION_INVALID (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_GENERATION_CANCELLED_FLAGS_PITCH_ANGLE
entry.description: Cancelled because vehicle pitch angle out of range. (cancelled: 1, not cancelled: 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_GENERATION_CANCELLED_FLAGS_ALTITUDE
entry.description: Cancelled because vehicle altitude out of range. (cancelled: 1, not cancelled: 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_GENERATION_CANCELLED_FLAGS_CROSS_TRACK_ERROR
entry.description: Cancelled because vehicle cross track error out of range. (cancelled: 1, not cancelled: 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_GENERATION_CANCELLED_FLAGS_DEPTH
entry.description: Cancelled because vehicle depth out of range. (cancelled: 1, not cancelled: 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_GENERATION_CANCELLED_FLAGS_ALONG_TRACK_DISTANCE_REMAINING
entry.description: Cancelled because vehicle position past TO waypoint. (cancelled: 1, not cancelled: 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_GENERATION_CANCELLED_FLAGS_ALONG_TRACK_VELOCITY
entry.description: Cancelled because vehicle velocity towards FROM waypoint. (cancelled: 1, not cancelled: 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_ROUTE_ENTRY_ACTION_VALID
entry.description: routeEntryAction cannot be ROUTE_ENTRY_ACTION_INVALID (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_ROUTE_END_ACTION_VALID
entry.description: routeEndAction cannot be ROUTE_END_ACTION_INVALID (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_ROUTE_NUM_WP_VALID
entry.description: routeNumWaypoints must be gt 0 and lte size of routeWaypoints (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_WP_TYPE_VALID
entry.description: waypointType of all waypoints cannot be WAYPOINT_TYPE_INVALID or WAYPOINT_TYPE_ADRIFT (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_LAST_WP_TYPE_VALID
entry.description: waypointType of last waypoint cannot be WAYPOINT_TYPE_ARC (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_HOLD_TIME_VALID
entry.description: holdTime must be gt zero for waypoints with waypointType WAYPOINT_TYPE_HOLD and WAYPOINT_TYPE_LOITER (ROUTE_TYPE_SAFENAV excepted) (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_VMS_STATE_VALID
entry.description: The VMS state and substate must be correct for the route type (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_SAFENAV_SUBSURFACE_COLLISION_STATUS_VALID
entry.description: Safenav status cannot be SAFENAV_SUBSURFACE_COLLISION_ROUTE_OVERRIDE or SAFENAV_SUBSURFACE_COLLISION_CRASHBACK for ROUTE_TYPE_MISSION (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_SAFENAV_MISSION_SYSTEM_ROUTE_ID_VALID
entry.description: The safenav nominal_route_id must match the active mission system routeID for ROUTE_TYPE_SAFENAV with SAFENAV_SUBSURFACE_COLLISION_ROUTE_OVERRIDE or SAFENAV_SUBSURFACE_COLLISION_LOITER status (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_SAFENAV_REENTRY_WP_VALID
entry.description: The safenav reentry_index must be a valid waypoint on the active mission system route for ROUTE_TYPE_SAFENAV with SAFENAV_SUBSURFACE_COLLISION_ROUTE_OVERRIDE status (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_SAFENAV_LOITER_VALID
entry.description: The turn radius must be lte the loiter_clearance for ROUTE_TYPE_SAFENAV with SAFENAV_SUBSURFACE_COLLISION_LOITER (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_ROUTE_UPDATED
entry.description: The route must be different to the last route of the same type received by the VMS (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_SAFENAV_COLLISION_STATUS_VALID
entry.description: Safenav status cannot be SAFENAV__COLLISION_ROUTE_OVERRIDE or SAFENAV_COLLISION_CRASHBACK for ROUTE_TYPE_MISSION (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_SAFENAV_AUTHORITY_VALID
entry.description: Safenav has the authority to command this route override (valid 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_WAYPOINT_ATTRIBUTES_SLOW_TO_POINT
entry.description: Decelerate when approaching waypoint (true: 1, false 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_WAYPOINT_ATTRIBUTES_COMPLETE_ON_SURFACING
entry.description: Complete waypoint on surface (true: 1, false 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_WAYPOINT_ATTRIBUTES_ENABLE_SAFE_SURFACE
entry.description: Enable safe surface mode for waypoint (true: 1, false 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_WAYPOINT_ATTRIBUTES_V2_SLOW_TO_POINT
entry.description: Decelerate when approaching waypoint (true: 1, false 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_WAYPOINT_ATTRIBUTES_V2_COMPLETE_ON_SURFACING
entry.description: Complete waypoint on surface (true: 1, false 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_WAYPOINT_ATTRIBUTES_V2_DISABLE_SAFENAV
entry.description: Disable safenav overrides for this waypoint (true: 1, false 0)

entry.name: DIVE_XL_WAYPOINT_ATTRIBUTES_V2_SAFENAV_NO_SKIP
entry.description: Safenav is not to skip the waypoint (true: 1, false 0)

enum.name: DIVE_XL_LDU_STATE_TRANSITION_RESULT
enum.description: Result of a state transition request for a a Dive-XL LDU (Leak Detection Unit) DBS (Discrete Ballast System) station.

entry.name: DIVE_XL_LDU_STATE_TRANSITION_INVALID
entry.description: The placeholder invalid value, reserved for index 0.

entry.name: DIVE_XL_LDU_STATE_TRANSITION_ACK
entry.description: The request message parameters are valid. The request was forwarded to the LDU over the main CAN bus.

entry.name: DIVE_XL_LDU_STATE_TRANSITION_ERROR_INVALID_MODULE
entry.description: The payload module id in the request message is invalid. Possible values are 1..3.

entry.name: DIVE_XL_LDU_STATE_TRANSITION_ERROR_INVALID_STATION
entry.description: The DBS station id in the request message is invalid. Possible values are 1..4.

entry.name: DIVE_XL_LDU_STATE_TRANSITION_ERROR_STATION_NOT_FOUND
entry.description: The DBS station referenced in the request message is not online.

entry.name: DIVE_XL_LDU_STATE_TRANSITION_ERROR_INVALID_TARGET_STATE
entry.description: The target operating state in the request message is invalid. Possible values are 1..4.

entry.name: DIVE_XL_LDU_STATE_TRANSITION_ERROR_INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION
entry.description: The target operating state in the request message cannot be entered from the DBS station's current operating state.

entry.name: DIVE_XL_LDU_STATE_TRANSITION_ERROR_INVALID_WATER_DENSITY
entry.description: The target operating state in the request message was PRE-FILLING and the supplied water density parameter is out of range. Possible values are 1000..1100.

entry.name: DIVE_XL_LDU_STATE_TRANSITION_ERROR_PROCESSING_FAILED
entry.description: A problem occurred in the VMS while processing the request (e.g. CAN encoding failure or CAN sending failure).

message.name: DIVE_XL_VMS_STATUS
message.description: State and substate of the vehicle state machine

message.name: DIVE_XL_APPEND_WAYPOINT
message.description: Append a waypoint to the staging route
message.field: Index of waypoint in the route
Vertical rate for vertical position change to next waypoint
Vertical rate type for vertical position change to next waypoint
Speed to maintain until next waypoint
Speed type to use until next waypoint
Route type the waypoint is to be appended to

message.name: DIVE_XL_APPEND_WAYPOINT_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment of DIVE_XL_APPEND_WAYPOINT message
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Identifier to be used for the staging route
Number of waypoints in staging after append
Route type associated with the waypoint

message.name: DIVE_XL_NEW_STAGING_ROUTE
message.description: Reset staging route and being defining a new route.
message.field: Identifier to be used for this route
Action to perform to connect the current route to the new route
Action to perform at the completion of this route

message.name: DIVE_XL_NEW_STAGING_ROUTE_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment sent to MS after a new staging route has been created
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Result of creating new staging route
Identifier of the new staging route
Route type of the new staging route

message.name: DIVE_XL_COMMIT_ROUTE
message.description: Commit current route to the flight controller
message.field: Identifier of route in staging to be committed
Number of waypoints expected in staging (for validation).
Route type of the route to be committed

message.name: DIVE_XL_COMMIT_ROUTE_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment sent to MS after a request to commit route
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Identifier to be used for this route
Number of waypoints committed to flight controller
Bitmap indicating which route flags are valid.
Route type of the route being committed

message.name: DIVE_XL_ROUTE_STATUS
message.description: Details off the current waypoint segment consiting of 3 waypoints (from, to, next) being executed by FCS
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Identifier of mission route being executed
Source route for the waypoint the current segment started at
Index of waypoint the current segment started at
Source route for the current target waypoint
Source route for the next waypoint to be executed after current waypoint is reached
Index of next waypoint to be executed after current waypoint is reached

message.name: DIVE_XL_METRIC
message.description: Contains one data point for metrics about the XL-AUV
message.field: Timestamp (in millis since epoch) of the metric (this will be interpreted as the time when the event happened)

message.name: DIVE_XL_NEW_SIGNAL
message.description: Define a signal to be injected by the FCS.
message.field: Signal amplitude in units defined by signal location (angular acceleation rad/s^2, acceleration m/s^2, angle rad, thruster speed RPM, velocity m/s, VBS fill fraction [0,1]).

message.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_GENERATION_EVENT
message.description: Command to control signal generation by the FCS.

message.name: DIVE_XL_NEW_SIGNAL_ACK
message.description: Status for the last signal sent to the FCS.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Bitmap indicating which signal flags are valid.

message.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_GENERATION_EVENT_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment sent to MS after receipt of signal generation event
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to

message.name: DIVE_XL_SIGNAL_GENERATION_STATUS
message.description: Signal generation status.
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Signal identifier of the last valid signal received.
Signal generation cancelled flag (cancelled: 1, not cancelled:0)

message.name: DIVE_XL_MANUAL_CONTROL_COMMANDS
message.description: Manual commands for the FCS
message.field: Sets the control mode that determines which of the manual commands are used.
Time in seconds after loss of comms that the VMS will transition from Manual:Active to Manual:Stopped.
Heading rate command fraction between -1 and 1. Used in DIVE_XL_MANUAL_CONTROL_MODE_HEADING_RATE and DIVE_XL_MANUAL_CONTROL_MODE_HEADING_RATE_AND_DEPTH_RATE.
Depth rate command fraction between -1 and 1. Used in DIVE_XL_MANUAL_CONTROL_MODE_HEADING_RATE_AND_DEPTH_RATE.
Rudder angle command fraction between -1 and 1. Used in DIVE_XL_MANUAL_CONTROL_MODE_RUDDER and DIVE_XL_MANUAL_CONTROL_MODE_RUDDER_AND_STERN_AND_BOW_PLANES.
Stern plane angle command fraction between -1 and 1. Used in DIVE_XL_MANUAL_CONTROL_MODE_RUDDER_AND_STERN_AND_BOW_PLANES.
Bow plane angle command fraction between -1 and 1. Used in DIVE_XL_MANUAL_CONTROL_MODE_RUDDER_AND_STERN_AND_BOW_PLANES.
Primary thruster command fraction between -1 and 1. Used in all manual control modes.
VBS vertical trim command fraction between -1 and 1. Used in all manual control modes.
VBS pitch trim fraction between -1 and 1. Used in all manual control modes.

message.name: DIVE_XL_MANUAL_CONTROL_COMMANDS_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment sent after receipt of manual control commands
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to

message.name: DIVE_XL_DEVICE_HEALTH
message.description: Reporting of device operating state and device health state
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Name of the device reporting operating state and health state
The device operating state being reported
The device health state being reported

message.name: DIVE_XL_NAV_SNX_TELEMETRY
message.description: Telemetry info from the SPRINT-Nav X LNavUTC
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Name of the device reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft
Angular rate about Vehicle Fwd axis (from LNavUTC)
Angular rate about Vehicle Stbd axis (from LNavUTC)
Angular rate about Vehicle Dwn axis (from LNavUTC)
Horizontal position 1σ error ellipse: Semi-major axis (from LNavUTC)
Horizontal position 1σ error ellipse: Semi-minor axis (from LNavUTC)
Horizontal position 1σ error ellipse: Direction of semi-major axis (from LNavUTC)
Horizontal velocity 1σ error ellipse: Semi-major axis (from LNavUTC)
Horizontal velocity 1σ error ellipse: Semi-minor axis (from LNavUTC)
Horizontal velocity 1σ error ellipse: Direction of semi-major axis (from LNavUTC)
The alignment status flag of the SPRINT-Nav X INS (aligned: 1, not aligned: 0)

message.name: DIVE_XL_NAV_UBLOX_TELEMETRY
message.description: Telemetry info from the Ublox GNSS
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
GPS time of week of the navigation epoch
The quality indicator of the Ublox GNSS (fix type)
Number of satellites used in Nav Solution
Heading accuracy estimate (both motion and vehicle)
Heading of vehicle (2-D), this is only valid when headVehValid is set, otherwise the output is set to the heading of motion
Magnetic declination. Only supported in ADR 4.10 and later
Magnetic declination accuracy. Only supported in ADR 4.10 and later

message.name: DIVE_XL_NAV_DVL_PD4_TELEMETRY
message.description: Telemetry info from the SPRINT-Nav X DVL PD4
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Name of the device reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft
The data structure of the message (PD4: 0, PD5: 1)
The number of bytes sent in this data structure, not including the checksum
Time of arrival of the data into the SPRINT-Nav X (microseconds instrument uptime)
Time of trigger when the SPRINT-Nav X is triggering the DVL (microseconds instrument uptime)
The velocity of the vessel in relation to the bottom in mm/s. Positive values indicate vessel motion to the east (X). LSD = 1 mm/s
The velocity of the vessel in relation to the bottom in mm/s. Positive values indicate vessel motion to the north (Y). LSD = 1 mm/s
The velocity of the vessel in relation to the bottom in mm/s. Positive values indicate vessel motion up (Z). LSD = 1 mm/s
The velocity error of the vessel in relation to the bottom in mm/s.
The validity of the east (X) velocity in relation to the bottom (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The validity of the north (Y) velocity in relation to the bottom (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The validity of the up (Z) velocity in relation to the bottom (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The validity of the error velocity in relation to the bottom (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The vertical range from the ADCP to the bottom as determined by each beam 1
The vertical range from the ADCP to the bottom as determined by each beam 2
The vertical range from the ADCP to the bottom as determined by each beam 3
The vertical range from the ADCP to the bottom as determined by each beam 4
The validity of beam 1 vertical range (vertical range valid: 1, vertical range not valid: 0)
The validity of beam 2 vertical range (vertical range valid: 1, vertical range not valid: 0)
The validity of beam 3 vertical range (vertical range valid: 1, vertical range not valid: 0)
The validity of beam 4 vertical range (vertical range valid: 1, vertical range not valid: 0)
Bitmap indicating DVL PD4 bottom status
The velocity of the vessel in relation to the water-mass reference layer in mm/s. Positive values indicate vessel motion to east (X). LSD = 1 mm/s
The velocity of the vessel in relation to the water-mass reference layer in mm/s. Positive values indicate vessel motion to north (Y) LSD = 1 mm/s
The velocity of the vessel in relation to the water-mass reference layer in mm/s. Positive values indicate vessel motion up (Z). LSD = 1 mm/s
The velocity error of the vessel in relation to the water-mass reference layer in mm/s
The validity of the east (X) velocity in relation to the water-mass reference layer (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The validity of the north (Y) velocity in relation to the water-mass reference layer (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The validity of the up (Z) velocity in relation to the water-mass reference layer (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The validity of the error velocity in relation to the water-mass reference layer (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The starting boundary (near surface) of the water-mass reference layer
The ending boundary (near bottom) of the water-mass reference layer
Bitmap indicating DVL PD4 reference layer status
The time in hours of first ping
The time in minutes of first ping
The time in seconds of first ping
The time in hundredths of first ping
Bitmap indicating DVL PD4 ADCP built in test function results
The manual or calculated speed of sound information
The water temperature at the transducer head
The checksum validity of the PD4 data (checksum valid: 1, checksum not valid: 0)

message.name: DIVE_XL_NAV_VBS_CONTROL_TELEMETRY
message.description: Telemetry commands sent to the Variable Ballast System (VBS)
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
VBS telemetry position, either fore or aft
Vehicle Depth Set by Host Vehicle

message.name: DIVE_XL_NAV_VBS_FEEDBACK_TELEMETRY
message.description: Telemetry feedbacks from the Variable Ballast System (VBS)
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
VBS telemetry position, either fore or aft
Serial Number in use on VBS
Firmware Version in use on VBS
Vehicle Depth Set by Host Vehicle

message.name: DIVE_XL_BATTERY_STATUS
message.description: A detailed report of battery state
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
General error (undocumented in battery protocol interface)

message.name: DIVE_XL_ACTUATOR_TELEMETRY
message.description: Actuators telemetry
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Starboard upper aft actuator motor controller fault state
Starboard upper aft actuator position sensor fault state
Starboard upper aft actuator temperature fault state
Starboard upper aft actuator communication fault state
Starboard lower aft actuator motor controller fault state
Starboard lower aft actuator position sensor fault state
Starboard lower aft actuator temperature fault state
Starboard lower aft actuator communication fault state
Port upper aft actuator motor controller fault state
Port upper aft actuator position sensor fault state
Port upper aft actuator temperature fault state
Port upper aft actuator communication fault state
Port lower aft actuator motor controller fault state
Port lower aft actuator position sensor fault state
Port lower aft actuator temperature fault state
Port lower aft actuator communication fault state
Port bow plane actuator motor controller fault state
Port bow plane actuator position sensor fault state
Port bow plane actuator temperature fault state
Port bow plane actuator communication fault state
Starboard bow plane actuator motor controller fault state
Starboard bow plane actuator position sensor fault state
Starboard bow plane actuator temperature fault state
Starboard bow plane actuator communication fault state
Average power drawn by this starboard upper actuator
Average power drawn by this starboard lower actuator
Average power drawn by this port upper actuator
Average power drawn by this port lower actuator
Average power drawn by this starboard bow plane actuator
Average power drawn by this port bow plane actuator
Motor phase current in starboard upper actuator
Motor phase current in starboard lower actuator
Motor phase current in port upper actuator
Motor phase current in port lower actuator
Motor phase current in starboard bow plane actuator
Motor phase current in port bow plane actuator

message.name: DIVE_XL_CONTROL_EFFECTOR_TELEMETRY
message.description: Effector controls and feedbacks
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)

message.name: DIVE_XL_SET_DEVICE_POWER_STATE
message.description: Set power state of a device
message.field: Index of the device to set power state

message.name: DIVE_XL_SET_DCDC_STATE
message.description: Set power state of a dcdc supply
message.field: Index of the dcdc to set power state

message.name: DIVE_XL_SET_CONTACTOR_STATE
message.description: Set power state of a contactor
message.field: Index of the contactor to set power state

message.name: DIVE_XL_SET_SAFETY_CONTACTORS_STATE
message.description: Set state of safety contactors
message.field: Requested power state for main contactors
Requested power state for payload contactors

message.name: DIVE_XL_SET_ALL_BATTERIES
message.description: Set state of all batteries

message.name: DIVE_XL_REPORT_DEVICE_POWER_STATE
message.description: Report power state of a device
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Name of the device to set power state
Index of the device, used for command

message.name: DIVE_XL_REPORT_DCDC_POWER_STATE
message.description: Report power state of a dcdc supply
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Name of the contactor to set power state
Index to dcdc array, used for command

message.name: DIVE_XL_REPORT_CONTACTOR_POWER_STATE
message.description: Report power state of a contactor
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Name of the device to set power state
Index to contactor array, used for command

message.name: DIVE_XL_REQUEST_STATE_TRANSITION
message.description: Request a state transition as defined by a state and substate

message.name: DIVE_XL_REQUEST_STATE_TRANSITION_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment of DIVE_XL_MISSION_EVENT message
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to

message.name: DIVE_XL_ELMO_THRUSTER_TELEMETRY
message.description: ELMO thruster telemetry and state information
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Status word as reported by ELMO thruster
Motor is switched on and ready for operation
Operation is enabled, motor can be commanded to move
Drive is in a fault state
Main voltage is provided to drive
Drive is in quick stop state

message.name: DIVE_XL_SET_IRONSHARK_MODE
message.description: Command pandion to make internal configuration changes for running on Iron Shark

message.name: DIVE_XL_ENV_TELEMETRY
message.description: A detailed report of the environmental state for a given source
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Enum indicating which source this message pertains to

message.name: DIVE_XL_MONITOR_OVERRIDE
message.description: Override or clear a contingency management monitor
message.field: Set to 1 for force override or 0 to clear override

message.name: DIVE_XL_MONITOR_OVERRIDE_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgement of a request to override or clear a contingency management monitor
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to

message.name: DIVE_XL_MONITOR_TELEMETRY
message.description: Describes the state of a contingency management system monitor
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Name of the monitor described in this message
Module category that the monitor belongs to

message.name: DIVE_XL_WCA_TELEMETRY
message.description: Describes the state of a contingency management WCA
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Name of the WCA described in this message
Describes triggered state of this WCA
Level associated with this WCA (warning, caution, or advistory)

message.name: DIVE_XL_SET_CSAC_TIME_CMD
message.description: A reference time to set the Chip Scale Atomic Clock (CSAC) with in absence of valid GPS time
message.field: The year component yyyy of date to set (e.g. 2024)
The month component mm of date to set ranging between 01 and 12
The day component dd of date to set ranging between 01 and 31
The hour component hh of the time to set ranging between 00 and 23
The minute component mm of the time to set ranging between 00 and 59
The second component ss of the time to set ranging between 00 and 59

message.name: DIVE_XL_SHUTDOWN_REQUESTED
message.description: A shutdown of the vehicle is under way. Perform any required shutdown activities prior to power down

message.name: DIVE_XL_SET_SNX_CONFIG_CMD
message.description: An ASCII config command to send to the SPRINT-Nav X device to query or change its current configuration loaded in memory
message.field: Configuration command to send to the SPRINT-Nav device
Id of SNX device to send the configuration command to. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id

message.name: DIVE_XL_SET_SNX_CONFIG_CMD_ACK
message.description: An ASCII reply to the config command sent to the SPRINT-Nav X device
message.field: A device reply to the configuration command to sent to the SPRINT-Nav device

message.name: DIVE_XL_WCA_ABORT_TRIGGER_TELEMETRY
message.description: Contains the name of the WCA that triggered the last transition to the abort state
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
String name of the WCA enumeration that was the cause of the last transition to the abort state
Index of the WCA that was the cause of the last transition to abort state
Timestamp that event occurred (ms since system boot)
Timestamp of the abort (ms since system boot)
Timestamp of the abort in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)

message.name: DIVE_XL_AID_SNX_WITH_EXTERNAL_POS
message.description: An external position provided as a source of aiding to the SPRINT-Nav X device
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)

message.name: DIVE_XL_GUID_CMD_TELEMETRY
message.description: Command telemetry outputs from guidance
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Flag for the selection of the speed command (ground speed: 0, primary thurster: 1)
Flag if the vertical rate command is to dive (false; 0, true; 1)
Flag if the vertical rate command is to surface (false; 0, true; 1)
Flag if a subsurface hold is commanded (false; 0, true; 1)
Flag if a pre dive depth override is commanded (false; 0, true; 1)
Flag if a pre dive speed override is commanded (false; 0, true; 1)

message.name: DIVE_XL_GUID_TRACK_DATA_TELEMETRY
message.description: Track Data telemetry outputs from guidance
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Distance between the From and To waypoints
Turn angle from the To waypoint to the Next waypoint
Distance complete along the track between From and To waypoints
Distance remaining along the track between From and To waypoints
Horizontal velocity component along the track between From and To waypoints
Horizontal velocity component towards the To waypoint
Cross track error to the track between the From and To waypoints
Horizontal velocity component normal to the track between From and To waypoints
Horizontal velocity component normal to the To waypoint

message.name: DIVE_XL_PFCS_CONTROL_MODE_TELEMETRY
message.description: PFCS control mode flags and fade fractions
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Flag for the low speed depth control mode (enabled: 1, disabled: 0)
Low speed depth control mode fade fraction
Flag for the high speed depth control mode (enabled: 1, disabled: 0)
High speed depth control mode fade fraction
Flag for the hydro control mode (enabled: 1, disabled: 0)
Flag for the surface control mode (enabled: 1, disabled: 0)
Flag for the dive control mode (enabled: 1, disabled: 0)
Flag for the ballast rate control mode to be ready (ready: 1, not ready: 0)
Flag for the ballast rate control mode (enabled: 1, disabled: 0)
Ballast rate control mode fade fraction
Flag for the hover control mode (enabled: 1, disabled: 0)

message.name: DIVE_XL_PFCS_RATE_AUGMENTATION_TELEMETRY
message.description: PFCS rate augmentation control terms
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Roll rate augmentation rate feedback control
Roll rate augmentation trim integrator saturated
Roll rate augmentation accel feed forward
Roll rate augmentation rate feed forward
Pitch rate augmentation rate feedback control
Pitch rate augmentation trim integrator saturated
Pitch rate augmentation accel feed forward
Pitch rate augmentation rate feed forward
Yaw rate augmentation rate feedback control
Yaw rate augmentation trim integrator saturated
Yaw rate augmentation accel feed forward
Yaw rate augmentation rate feed forward
Thrust rate augmentation rate feedback control
Thrust rate augmentation trim integrator saturated
Thrust rate augmentation accel feed forward
Thrust rate augmentation rate feed forward
Heave rate augmentation rate feedback control
Heave rate augmentation trim integrator saturated
Heave rate augmentation accel feed forward
Heave rate augmentation rate feed forward
Roll rate augmentation trim integrator output
Pitch rate augmentation trim integrator output
Yaw rate augmentation trim integrator output
Thrust rate augmentation trim integrator output
Heave rate augmentation trim integrator output

message.name: DIVE_XL_ACOUSTIC_COMMS_TELEMETRY
message.description: Contains details of the ACOMMS device

message.name: MARITIME_THRUSTER_TELEMETRY
message.description: Maritime thruster telemetry and state information
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Status word as reported by the thruster
Operation is enabled, motor can be commanded to move
Motor is switched on and ready for operation
Drive is in a fault state
Main voltage is provided to drive
Drive is in quick stop state

message.name: MARITIME_SVS_TELEMETRY
message.description: Maritime svs telemetry
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Measured speed of sound through water

message.name: MARITIME_CT_TELEMETRY
message.description: Maritime ct telemetry
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)

message.name: MARITIME_CSAC_TELEMETRY
message.description: Maritime csac telemetry
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)

message.name: MARITIME_SNX_GGA_OBSERVATION_TELEMETRY
message.description: GGA Observation status for the SNX
message.field: System Time of first data recieve

message.name: MARITIME_SNX_SUSBL_OBSERVATION_TELEMETRY
message.description: SUSBL Observation status for the SNX
message.field: System Time of first data recieve

message.name: MARITIME_SNX_DVL_OBSERVATION_TELEMETRY
message.description: DVL Observation status for the SNX
message.field: System Time of first data recieve
Group ID to associate observations that are batched processed together
Sound speed used by Kalman filter

message.name: MARITIME_SNX_PDEPTH_OBSERVATION_TELEMETRY
message.description: PDEPTH Observation status for the SNX
message.field: System Time of first data recieve

message.name: MARITIME_SNX_BIST_TELEMETRY
message.description: BIST IMU status for the SNX
message.field: FW Version: Major, Minor, Interim, Build.

message.name: MARITIME_ACOMMS_USBL_TELEMETRY
message.description: Maritime Acomms USBL aiding information telemetry
message.field: Enable or disable aiding from the Acomms device (enable: 1, disable: 0)
Reports if the vehicle is in the USBL cone of the host vessel (true: 1, false: 0)
Angle of the vehicle relative to the host vessel

message.name: MARITIME_SNX_SVS_OBSERVATION_TELEMETRY
message.description: SVS Observation status for the SNX
message.field: System Time of first data recieve

message.name: MARITIME_SNX_LBL_OBSERVATION_TELEMETRY
message.description: LBL Observation status for the SNX
message.field: System Time of first data recieve

message.name: MARITIME_ACOMMS_CHECK_HARDWARE_TELEMETRY
message.description: Acomms status of the check hardware command
message.field: Failure report list of components effected

message.name: MARITIME_MISSION_DURATION_TELEMETRY
message.description: Mission duration countdown
message.field: Countdown from total mission duration timeout
Time remaining on VMS mission duration timer

message.name: MARITIME_DROP_WEIGHTS_TELEMETRY
message.description: Status information regarding the Drop Weights
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Requested state of the ELB being enabled
Current state of the ELB being enabled
User Overrode the ELB enable state
Requested State of ELB vote to drop weights
Current State of ELB vote to drop weights
User Overrode the ELB trigger state
User Overrode the ELB GPIO state

message.name: MARITIME_SET_DROP_WEIGHTS_ENABLE_STATE
message.description: Commands the Drop Weight System into a set enable state
message.field: Request a user override for the enable state

message.name: MARITIME_SET_DROP_WEIGHTS_TRIGGER_STATE
message.description: Commands the Drop Weight System into a set trigger state
message.field: Request a user override for the triggered state

message.name: DIVE_XL_BLOS_MAST_SUBMIT_REQUEST
message.description: Submit a control request to the Beyond Line of Sight (BLOS) mast system
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request used in the ack

message.name: DIVE_XL_BLOS_MAST_SUBMIT_REQUEST_ACK
message.description: ACK of a control request to the Beyond Line of Sight (BLOS) mast system
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to

message.name: DIVE_XL_BLOS_MAST_FEEDBACK_TELEMETRY
message.description: Telemetry feedback from Beyond Line of Sight (BLOS) mast system
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Power state of the BLOS payload (i.e. comms antenna)

message.name: MARITIME_SET_DROP_WEIGHTS_GPIO_STATE
message.description: Commands the Drop Weight System into a set GPIO state
message.field: Request a user override for the GPIO state

message.name: DIVE_XL_CRM_CHANNEL_TELEMETRY
message.description: Telemetry feedback for CRM devices
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Channel mode (0: disabled, 1: passthrough, 2: passthrough_all, 3: encapsulate)

message.name: DIVE_XL_STATE_CONTROL_VIU_CLOCK_STATUS_TELEMETRY
message.description: Telemetry feedback for State Control VIU Clock Status
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Timestamp in UTC seconds that the State Control VIU is reporting
State Control VIU Clock time solution quality indicator
State Control VIU missed PPS signals count
State Control VIU time since boot ms

message.name: DIVE_XL_ENTER_HIBERNATE_CMD
message.description: Issue a command requesting the VMS to enter hibernate
message.field: The time for the VMS to exit hibernate in utc seconds since epoch.

message.name: DIVE_XL_ENTER_HIBERNATE_CMD_ACK
message.description: An acknowledgement of the request for the VMS to enter hibernate with a status code.
message.field: The status code of the enter hibernate cmd in the form of an accept or a rejection with reason.

message.name: DIVE_XL_EXIT_HIBERNATE_CMD
message.description: Issue a command requesting the VMS to exit hibernate

message.name: DIVE_XL_EXIT_HIBERNATE_CMD_ACK
message.description: An acknowledgement of the request for the VMS to exit hibernate with a status code.
message.field: The status code of the exit hibernate cmd in the form of an accept or a rejection with reason.

message.name: DIVE_XL_HIBERNATE_TELEMETRY
message.description: Telemetry feedback for the hibernate system
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Reports capability status of hibernate system.
The time for the VMS to exit hibernate in utc seconds since epoch.
Last reason why the vehicle exited hibernate.
Last Reason why the vehicle exited low power.
Flag to request last valid position from mission.

message.name: DIVE_XL_STATE_CONTROL_VIU_LOW_POWER_STATUS_TELEMETRY
message.description: VIU low power state status
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
The current low power state of the system
The reason for the most recent exit from low power mode
Enable exit by a payload event
Enable exit by a vehicle bell
Enable exit by a target wake time
Enable exit by low battery voltage
Enable exit by low battery SoC
The wake time (only applicable if the TARGET_WAKE_TIME reason is enabled)
The battery voltage (only applicable if the LOW_BATTERY_VOLTAGE reason is enabled)
The battery low SOC threshold (only applicable if the LOW_BATTERY_SOC reason is enabled)
Enable exit by an acoustic event (single ended)
Enable exit by an acoustic event (differential)

message.name: DIVE_XL_STATE_CONTROL_VIU_GPI_TELEMETRY
message.description: The GPI Status coming out of the the State Control VIU
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)

message.name: DIVE_XL_TWOG_ACTUATOR_FEEDBACK_TELEMETRY
message.description: Telemetry feedback from a twog actuator (field values are NAN if data is stale or not available)
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Position of the actuator (radians for rotary, meters for linear)
Position of the actuator (radians for rotary, meters for linear)
Minimum velocity of the actuator (rads/second or m/s)
Maximum velocity of the actuator (rads/second or m/s)
Mean velocity of the actuator (rads/second or m/s)

message.name: DIVE_XL_PAYLOAD_LEAK_DETECTOR_TELEMETRY
message.description: Telemetry feedback from Payload Leak Detector Units
message.field: Event timestamp in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
The payload module containing this leak detector
The station being monitored by this leak detector
The operating state of the leak detector in this payload station
Whether a leak is present in this payload station
Indicates if the first poppet on the payload station DBS is open
Indicates if the second poppet on the payload station DBS is open
Indicates if the third poppet on the payload station DBS is open
Indicates if the fourth poppet on the payload station DBS is open
Sensor pressure (minimum since the last telemetry message)
Sensor pressure (mean since the last telemetry message)
Sensor pressure (maximum since the last telemetry message)
Sensor temperature (minimum since the last telemetry message)
Sensor temperature (mean since the last telemetry message)
Sensor temperature (maximum since the last telemetry message)
Ratio of the pressure to the temperature in this station's DBS
Computed air pressure in this station's DBS
Computed water volume in this station's DBS
Computed water height in this station's DBS
The density of water assumed to be in this station's DBS

message.name: DIVE_XL_PAYLOAD_LEAK_DETECTOR_REQUEST_STATE_TRANSITION
message.description: Request a Payload Leak Detector to transition to a different state
message.field: The requestor's unique identifier for this command message
The payload module targeted by this command
The station within the payload module targeted by this command
The target operating state of the DBS targeted by this command
The density of water assumed during the PREFILLING state

message.name: DIVE_XL_PAYLOAD_LEAK_DETECTOR_REQUEST_STATE_TRANSITION_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgement of a state transition request for a Payload Leak Detector
message.field: The unique identifier from the request that this message is acknowledging
Indicates the result from the LDU state transition request.

message.name: DIVE_XL_SET_POWERED_DEVICE_STATE
message.description: Command to set the power state of a device
message.field: Boolean flag: 1 to power on the device, 0 to power off the device

message.name: DIVE_XL_SET_POWERED_DEVICE_STATE_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgement of a powered device state change request
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Response code indicating if the request was accepted or rejected

message.name: DIVE_XL_POWER_SWITCH_TELEMETRY
message.description: Power Switch Telemetry
message.field: Event timestamp in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)

message.name: DIVE_XL_POWERED_DEVICE_TELEMETRY
message.description: Powered Device Telemetry
message.field: Event timestamp in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Duration since last actual state change.
